name: highmark-precert
description: Highmark (Blue Cross Blue Shield of PA/WV/DE + western NY) commercial prior-authorization packet for a hospital-outpatient (POS 22) knee arthroscopy. The 'Highmark' letterhead routes the bundle to the 'highmark' payer bucket (spec-v52 §4.5.13) and engages the Highmark commercial overlay. The packet cites the applicable Highmark Medical Policy and attaches a clinical note (R-PA-HIGHMARK-001/002 pass), omits any submission-channel reference (R-PA-HIGHMARK-003 info), and -- as an outpatient surgery requested in a hospital-outpatient setting -- carries no site-of-care rationale for the higher-acuity site (R-PA-HIGHMARK-009 flag). Every other Highmark rule self-gates off (no imaging, drug, DME, behavioral-health, transplant, appeal, or out-of-network trigger) and vacuously passes.

documents.name: highmark-pa-form.txt
documents.text:
Highmark Blue Shield PPO Prior Authorization Request
Patient: Mary C Roe
DOB: 1968-11-22
Member ID: HMK123456789
Date of service: 2026-06-25
Place of service: 22
Requested procedure: knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy CPT 29881
Dx: M23.205 derangement of medial meniscus, left knee
Quantity: 1
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
Medical necessity: persistent mechanical symptoms; see the applicable Highmark Medical Policy.
Signature: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10

documents.name: highmark-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: left knee pain with locking and catching.
History of present illness: four months of mechanical symptoms despite activity modification.
Physical exam: positive McMurray on the left; joint-line tenderness medially.
Assessment and plan: left medial meniscus tear; recommend arthroscopic partial meniscectomy.
Medical necessity: imaging confirms a displaced medial meniscus tear.
Note date: 2026-06-10
Signed: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10
